body.title: [awaiting_validation] context-load starts the session by reading the slate, not /query-ticket
body.intention: A resumed session reflexively reads the day's slate whole and acts on its Next: hand-off; /query-ticket is never the first move.
body.description:
context-load never named the slate as the session entry point, and Step 1 of the `run` script only extracted `## Summary` — a section today's slates don't carry — so context-load surfaced nothing actionable and CC defaulted to proposing /query-ticket first (an error). Two-part fix: (1) SKILL.md gains a hard-stop banner — the session ALWAYS starts by reading the day's slate whole (today's, or yesterday's if none); /query-ticket is NOT the entry point; act on the slate's `Next:` line. (2) Step 1 surfaces the live hand-off (last `## In-flight` + last `## Session close` `Next:`) instead of `## Summary`, handling both slate styles (body-below and inline `## In-flight: ...`), and suppressing space-separated header suffixes (dates) from inline capture.

**Affected files:** skills/context-load/SKILL.md, skills/context-load/run
**Design rules:** none apply (skill-doc + read-only orientation script; no memory-shape or persistence change, no sqlite). test-plan-or-why-not satisfied below.
**Scope boundary:** IN — context-load SKILL.md banner + Step 1 hand-off surfacing in `run`. OUT — changing slate format/schema, day-close, /query-ticket itself, or any other skill.
**Test plan:** Exec `step_1_today_slate()` against the 20260626 slate and confirm it emits the launcher `## In-flight` note + the `Next: /sprint T-mcp-dispatch-by-addressee` line, with no date-suffix noise from the `## Session close 2026-06-26` header. (Done — verified manually this session; no automated test harness exists for context-load `run` steps.)

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Fixed: SKILL.md hard-stop banner makes the slate the session entry point (not /query-ticket); Step 1 of run now surfaces the live hand-off (last ## In-flight + ## Session close Next:), handling both slate styles + suppressing date-suffix noise. Proof: step_1_today_slate() vs 20260626 slate emits launcher In-flight + 'Next: /sprint T-mcp-dispatch-by-addressee'.
